title: Thackery
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Thackery''''' was a [[Warship/Legends|warship]] that saw service with the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. It was sent to [[Galantos]], along with the ''[[Gol Storn]]'' in order to protect it from the [[Yevetha]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Shield of Lies (abridged audiobook)|''Shield of Lies'' abridged audiobook]]
